fleet.intro: From planetary surface to orbit in a single bound
fleet.description: Built by Hanseo Galactic and operated by Comet Spaceways, the Planet Jumper EV-1 is a high-performance ascent and short-transfer vehicle engineered for rapid, reliable travel between planetary surfaces and orbit. Whether lifting passengers from Earth’s spaceports to Celestia Orbital Station or conducting swift transfers between neighboring deep-space platforms, the EV-1 is purpose-built for efficiency. Designed with precision aerodynamics, reinforced orbital shielding, and advanced guidance systems, it transforms what was once a complex launch procedure into a seamless transition from ground to gateway.
fleet.promotionalCatch: From launchpad to rendezvous, Planet Jumper EV-1 delivers you to orbit with speed, confidence, and uncompromising control.
features: 🔹 Optimized Ascent Architecture – High-thrust propulsion and adaptive flight control systems ensure rapid, stable climbs from planetary surfaces to low orbit.
🔹 Precision Orbital Transfers – Advanced docking guidance and autonomous navigation enable smooth, accurate connections with orbital stations and nearby space habitats.
🔹 Security-First Engineering – Reinforced hull integrity, redundant life-support systems, and real-time diagnostics prioritize passenger safety at every stage of flight.
🔹 Comfort in Motion – Ergonomically designed seating, vibration-dampening structures, and pressure-stabilized cabins provide a calm and controlled ride, even during high-acceleration ascent.
🔹 Streamlined Configuration – Designed exclusively for short-duration flights, the EV-1 eliminates unnecessary onboard amenities to maximize performance, reliability, and turnaround efficiency.

fleet.intro: Elevate yourself from Earth’s surface to orbit on a continuous line
fleet.description: Developed by the EuroStar Consortium and operated by Comet Spaceways, the Space Elevator redefines ascent as a seamless vertical journey rather than a launch. Instead of rockets and combustion, passengers board a high-speed transportation pod mounted on reinforced orbital railings that extend from a dedicated Earth-based spaceport to a terminal hub within Celestia Orbital Station. Permanently anchored to both planet and station, the system offers a stable, efficient, and precisely controlled transfer corridor between ground and low orbit. It transforms the once dramatic leap into space into a smooth, engineered climb along humanity’s most ambitious infrastructure spine.
fleet.promotionalCatch: No countdown. No turbulence. Just a direct ascent from Earth to orbit, permanently connected every second of the way.
features: 🔹 Continuous Surface-to-Orbit Link – A structurally reinforced rail system connecting Earth directly to Celestia Orbital Station, ensuring uninterrupted transit without conventional launch procedures.
🔹 High-Speed Vertical Transfer Pods – Aerodynamically shielded, magnetically stabilized cabins engineered for rapid ascent and descent with minimal vibration and controlled acceleration.

🔹 Security-Integrated Infrastructure – Multi-layer structural monitoring, redundant braking systems, and real-time environmental controls provide constant operational oversight throughout the journey.
🔹 Comfort Through Stability – Pressurized cabins, adaptive seating, and motion-balancing systems deliver a calm, steady ride designed specifically for short-duration transfers.

🔹 Unlimited Data Continuity – Permanently connected to Earth’s global data grid, the Space Elevator imposes no restrictions on digital bandwidth, allowing passengers unrestricted data access and real-time connectivity from surface to orbit.
🔹 Streamlined Transit Design – Built exclusively for efficient ascent and descent operations, the system eliminates onboard amenities in favor of speed, safety, and rapid turnaround scheduling.

fleet.intro: Transforming short-haul transit into a celestial masterpiece.
fleet.description: Engineered by Bharat Interstellar and operated by the visionaries at Comet Spaceways, the Shooting Star D400 is the definitive workhorse of cisplanetary travel. Designed to bridge the gap between neighboring moons, orbital space stations, and the rugged, resource-rich sectors of the asteroid belt, this vessel prioritizes both industrial-grade reliability and passenger indulgence. While its sleek, dark-metallic hull is built to navigate the high-velocity debris of the belt with ease, the interior remains a sanctuary of calm. The D400 turns a routine commute into a premium voyage, ensuring that every jump through the stars feels less like a flight and more like a destination in its own right.
fleet.promotionalCatch: Fast as a meteor, smooth as a star. Your premium bridge across the belt and beyond.
features: 🔹 Optimized Cisplanetary Agility – Engineered specifically for rapid-response maneuvers between moons and stations, minimizing transit time within local gravitational wells.
🔹 Asteroid Belt Navigation Suite – Equipped with reinforced hull plating and advanced predictive sensor arrays designed for high-speed, safe passage through dense asteroid corridors.
🔹 The 'Nirvana' Dining Experience – A sophisticated onboard bar and restaurant served by a seamless blend of human hospitality and precision robotic attendants.
🔹 Deep-Space VR Immersion – A dedicated VR lounge featuring high-tech armchairs and neural-link headsets for entertainment that transcends the physical cabin.
🔹 Ergonomic Multi-Aisle Cabin – A spacious 3-4-3 seating configuration inspired by elite commercial airliners, providing maximum accessibility and passenger comfort.
🔹 Bharat Interstellar Propulsion – Powered by 'Hanuman' dual-core engines, providing silent, vibration-free thrust for a stable ride even during complex orbital injections.
